overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running through an autumn forest during golden hour, transitioning from sunlit woods through darker dense forest and past ancient ruins with campfires. The clip features cinematic lighting with dramatic sun rays and atmospheric haze.

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a dirt path through a sunlit forest with tall oak trees. Golden hour light filters through the canopy creating dramatic sun rays. The environment is natural and empty of other characters.

segments.scene_description: The forest becomes denser and darker as the canopy blocks the sunlight. The path continues through thick tree trunks with atmospheric mist visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest ruins with wooden structures and campfires

segments.scene_description: The character approaches ancient wooden ruins in a forest clearing. A stone gate and thatched-roof huts become visible with campfires burning, creating a mixed lighting of fading daylight and firelight.

events.description: leaving the ruined settlement behind and returning to open forest

agents.ego_description: running through the settlement past campfires and exiting back to the forest path

entered.detail: open area of forest visible beyond the settlement

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway into a small settlement with burning campfires and wooden huts, then continues through and exits back into the open forest as dusk settles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant autumn forest that gradually transitions from a sun-drenched woodland into a dense, shadowed thicket. It begins with the character running along a dirt path beneath tall oak trees, where golden hour light filters through the canopy to create dramatic sun rays. As the camera advances, the open brightness begins to fade as the canopy closes in, blocking the sunlight and casting the environment into deeper shadow. The scene then shifts into a darker, more oppressive atmosphere where the path winds through thick tree trunks and atmospheric mist clings to the distant woods.

The shot follows a continuous movement from a sunlit forest clearing into a flickering settlement before returning to the deepening shadows of the woods. It begins as the character approaches ancient wooden ruins, where a stone gate and thatched-roof huts emerge from the trees. As the camera moves forward, the lighting shifts from the fading daylight of the forest to the warm, orange glow of burning campfires within the settlement. The scene then passes through the stone archway and between the wooden huts before exiting the village. Finally, the camera moves back into the open forest as the golden hour fades and dusk settles over the landscape.
